moments.title: Wimbledon Championships in full swing
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of the Wimbledon Championships is currently underway at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, 2026.

angles.name: General buzz
angles.copy: Centre Court drama, strawberries & cream, and all the Pimm's you can drink. Wimbledon is officially ON! Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: Our British hopefuls are battling it out on the grass courts at Wimbledon. Keep an eye on the schedule for the home-grown talent.

angles.name: The atmosphere
angles.copy: That unique Wimbledon atmosphere is back! From the roar of the crowd to the quiet intensity, there's nothing quite like it.

moments.title: Tour de France kicks off this weekend
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on Saturday, July 4, 2026, starting in Barcelona and concluding in Paris on July 26.

source.l: Tour de France Official Site / The Guardian

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of gruelling climbs and breathtaking sprints! The Tour de France starts this Saturday in Barcelona.

angles.name: Cycling fever
angles.copy: The biggest cycling event in the world is almost here. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey at this year's Tour de France?

angles.name: Stage 1 preview
angles.copy: Stage 1 of the Tour de France is a team time trial through Barcelona. A unique start to the Grand Boucle!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 action continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, which started on June 11 and runs until July 19, is currently dominating sports headlines and fan discussions.

source.l: FIFA Official Site / ITV (Love Island promo)

angles.name: World Cup buzz
angles.copy: The World Cup is in full swing and the drama is non-stop! Which team has surprised you most so far?

angles.name: Match day excitement
angles.copy: Another day, more World Cup football! Grab your snacks and settle in for some epic clashes.

angles.name: Tournament talk
angles.copy: From VAR controversies to wonder goals, the World Cup is providing all the talking points. What's your highlight of the tournament so far?

moments.title: Love Island UK in Casa Amor chaos
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, which premiered on June 1st, 2026, has hit its dramatic halfway point with the arrival of Casa Amor, testing the existing couples.

angles.name: Casa Amor drama
angles.copy: It's Casa Amor week on Love Island and it's absolute chaos! Who do you think will stay loyal and whose head will turn?

angles.name: Halfway point
angles.copy: We're officially at the halfway mark in the Love Island villa, and Casa Amor is delivering all the twists! What's been your favourite moment so far?

angles.name: The debrief
angles.copy: Last night's Love Island episode was EXPLOSIVE. Let's discuss: are any of these couples actually going to last?

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Legendary birthday
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! Still rocking after all these years. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Blondie icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! An absolute icon of punk and new wave.

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th Birthday
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Hip-hop royalty
angles.copy: It's Missy Elliott's 55th birthday! An absolute legend who changed the game for hip-hop and R&B. Get your freak on!

angles.name: Timeless tracks
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the incomparable Missy Elliott! Her music still sounds as fresh today as it did when it first dropped.

moments.title: Fred Schneider turns 75
moments.blurb: Fred Schneider, the distinctive vocalist of The B-52s, celebrates his 75th birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Love Shack vibes
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the inimitable Fred Schneider of The B-52s! Get up and 'Love Shack' this evening!

angles.name: B-52s legend
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 75th birthday to Fred Schneider! His unique style made The B-52s truly unforgettable.

moments.title: Burna Boy's 34th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Nigerian superstar Burna Boy celebrates his 34th birthday tomorrow, July 2nd.

angles.name: African Giant
angles.copy: The African Giant himself, Burna Boy, turns 34 tomorrow! Get ready to celebrate his incredible music.

angles.name: Birthday anticipation
angles.copy: Big birthday vibes for Burna Boy tomorrow! What's your ultimate track from the superstar?

moments.title: Michelle Branch turns 43
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', celebrates her 43rd birthday tomorrow, July 2nd.

angles.name: Early 00s nostalgia
angles.copy: Remember 'Everywhere'? Michelle Branch turns 43 tomorrow! Get ready for some early 00s pop-rock throwbacks.

angles.name: Birthday wishes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 43rd Birthday to the talented Michelle Branch for tomorrow! What's your favourite song of hers?

moments.title: Vince Clarke's 66th Birthday
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to synth-pop maestro Vince Clarke on July 3rd! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his influence is undeniable.

angles.name: Iconic sounds
angles.copy: The man behind so many iconic 80s hits! Wishing Vince Clarke a fantastic 66th birthday this Friday.

moments.title: Shane Lynch turns 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone member Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyzone milestone
angles.copy: Can you believe Shane Lynch from Boyzone is turning 50 this Friday? Happy Birthday to a 90s pop legend!

angles.name: Half a century
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 50th Birthday to Shane Lynch on July 3rd! What's your favourite Boyzone memory?

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st Birthday
moments.blurb: Genre-blending artist Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday weekend
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone this Saturday! Get ready to crank up some of his biggest hits.

angles.name: Genre-bender
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Post Malone! Always pushing boundaries with his music.

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: It's gonna be 'The Power of Love' all weekend! Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on Sunday.

angles.name: 80s icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 76th birthday to Huey Lewis! What's your favourite track from Huey Lewis & The News?

moments.title: RZA's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Wu-Tang Clan leader and producer RZA celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the architect of the Wu-Tang Clan, RZA, this Sunday! A true hip-hop visionary.

angles.name: Legendary producer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only RZA! His beats defined an era.

moments.title: 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

angles.name: Rap legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent on July 6th! Still making moves and dropping bangers.

moments.title: John Keeble turns 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: True Gold
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble of Spandau Ballet on Monday! Get ready to blast some 'True' classics.

angles.name: Spandau Ballet drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to Spandau Ballet's John Keeble! An 80s legend.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 this Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to Sir Ringo Starr! An absolute legend of music.

moments.title: UK schools break for summer
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are starting to break up for the summer holidays this week, marking the official start of the summer break for families.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: School's officially out for summer for many across the UK! What are your big plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Family fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here! Wishing all the families a fantastic break filled with fun and sunshine.
